archived_tasks.title: Add GAIN to the marketplace with Pro/Business/Enterprise plan selector
archived_tasks.description: Add GAIN — Govern AI Now as the first live product on the Mojo marketplace. Remove all mock placeholder products. Build a plan-selector dialog showing Pro ($100/mo), Business ($250/mo), and Enterprise ($500/mo) tiers with real feature lists sourced from the GAIN repo pricing data. Update the compare section to show all four tiers (Free, Pro, Business, Enterprise).
